body.title: NE arc expiry — TTL-based close for stale NE arcs
body.result: NARRATIVE_GAP auto-close on age: first_pushed_at in gap metadata, _process_gaps() checks age vs NARRATIVE_GAP_MAX_AGE_MINUTES=60; logs NARRATIVE_GAP_TIMEDOUT to ring(ne_diagnostic). Syntax OK.
body.description: NE arcs need TTL-based expiry/archival. Arcs exceeding a time threshold without resolution should be auto-shelved or archived, not looped indefinitely. Observed live: T-book-learner-hash-lookup arc cycled every 2min for 195min before being noticed. DISTILLATION engram pattern is the intended closer long-term. Short-term: add max_age_minutes field to NE arc tracking; background source or NE tick archives stale arcs.
